unknown-field.diag profile unknown profile document field
self-parent.diag syntax must not extend itself
duplicate-mapping.diag syntax duplicate syntax mapping coordinate
mapping-order.diag syntax mappings must be sorted
invalid-formatting.diag syntax formatting line_width must be in 1..=512
duplicate-overlay.diag profile policy_overlays must contain unique symbols
invalid-type-mode.diag profile type_mode must be dynamic, gradual, infer-strict, or strict
